government_schemes.name: PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi
government_schemes.description: Central sector income support scheme for landholding farmer families across the country.
government_schemes.benefits: ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments of ₹2,000 directly into the bank accounts.

government_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
government_schemes.description: Government sponsored crop insurance scheme securing farmers against harvest failures due to weather and pests.
government_schemes.benefits: Full financial insurance coverage against crop damage at extremely low premium rates (1.5% to 2% for farmers).

government_schemes.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
government_schemes.description: National project assisting farmers in optimizing fertilizer usage and testing nutrients.
government_schemes.benefits: Free physical soil testing reports every 2 years, containing specific advisory on micro-nutrients and manure.

government_schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
government_schemes.description: Short-term credit support system helping farmers purchase timely farming inputs.
government_schemes.benefits: Low-interest loans (up to 4% interest rate on prompt repayment) to cover working capital needs for crop cycle.

government_schemes.name: GramVikas Organic Subsidy
government_schemes.description: Village Panchayat green fund promoting bio-farming practices and organic crop growth.
government_schemes.benefits: 50% direct subsidy up to ₹15,000 for constructing vermicompost beds and bio-fertilizer stocks.

government_schemes.name: PMKSY - Micro Irrigation Subsidy
government_schemes.description: Financial assistance scheme for implementing modern drip and sprinkler irrigation systems.
government_schemes.benefits: Up to 55% direct capital subsidy on installation costs for small/marginal farmers, and 45% for other farmers.

government_schemes.name: PM-Kusum Solar Pump Scheme
government_schemes.description: Solar energy support scheme for installing subsidized solar water pumps and solarizing grid-connected agricultural pumps.
government_schemes.benefits: 60% overall capital subsidy (30% central + 30% state gov), with bank loans covering 30% and farmer contribution of only 10%.

government_schemes.name: SMAM Tractor & Farm Implement Subsidy
government_schemes.description: Central sector scheme for promoting agricultural mechanization and custom hiring centers.
government_schemes.benefits: 40% to 50% direct financial subsidy on the purchase of tractors, rotavators, power tillers, and sowing drills.

government_schemes.name: National Horticulture Mission (NHM)
government_schemes.description: Development program targeting holistic growth of the horticulture sector (fruits, vegetables, flowers, spices).
government_schemes.benefits: 50% capital subsidy (up to ₹3 Lakhs) for polyhouse/greenhouse construction, nursery setup, and cold storage units.

government_schemes.name: National Livestock Mission (NLM)
government_schemes.description: Financial support program encouraging entrepreneurs and farmers to establish dairy, poultry, and goat rearing units.
government_schemes.benefits: 25% capital subsidy (33.3% for SC/ST categories) on bank loans for purchasing crossbred cattle, building sheds, and feed management.

notifications.title: Application Approved
notifications.message: Your Residence Certificate application (app-002) has been approved by the Administrator.

notices.title: Gram Sabha General Assembly Meeting
notices.content: All village residents are requested to attend the upcoming Gram Sabha meeting to discuss the annual budget, drinking water pipe installation, and road repair allocations.

notices.title: Free Health & Eye Checkup Camp
notices.content: A medical team from the District Civil Hospital is organizing a free health camp. Services include general checkup, blood pressure screening, diabetes testing, and free eye drops distribution.

notices.title: Annual Harvest Festival & Ganesh Chaturthi Celebrations
notices.content: Preparations for the annual cultural parade and community dinner are starting. Volunteers requested to contact the cultural committee.

notices.title: Subsidized Solar Pump Distribution Notice
notices.content: Applications are invited for PM-Kusum scheme solar water pumps. Beneficiaries will receive a 60% subsidy. Submit land ownership copy and Aadhaar before July 30.

notices.title: Clean Rampur (Swachhta Abhiyan) Drive
notices.content: Let us join hands to make our village plastic-free. Cleaning drive will start from Ward 1 and finish at the river bridge.

notices.title: Drinking Water Timing Shift
notices.content: Due to pump maintenance at the reservoir, public drinking water supply will be active from 6:00 AM to 8:00 AM instead of evening hours for the next 3 days.

complaints.description: Huge potholes near the primary school main gate. It is very dangerous for children cycling or walking to school.
Main drinking water pipeline is leaking at Ward 3 junction. A large volume of clean water is being wasted since yesterday morning.
complaints.adminRemarks: Plumbing contractor notified. Repairs scheduled for tomorrow morning.

complaints.description: Three streetlights are completely non-functional on Maruti Mandir street, making the entire lane dark and unsafe at night.
complaints.adminRemarks: Streetlight bulbs replaced by Panchayat electrical contractor on July 10.

facilities.name: Zilla Parishad Primary School, Vadgaon Rasai
facilities.details: Grades 1-7. Medium: Marathi. Student capacity: 180. Headmaster: Mr. S. B. Walunj. Phone: +91 2138-223101. Hours: 8:00 AM - 1:30 PM.

facilities.name: Shri Bhairavnath Vidyalaya & Jr. College
facilities.details: Secondary & Higher Secondary Education (Arts/Commerce/Science). Principal: Shri. V. K. Shirke. Phone: +91 94210 55667.

facilities.name: Primary Health Center (PHC), Vadgaon Rasai
facilities.details: 24/7 delivery room, ambulance service, and outpatient clinic. Medical Officer: Dr. Sachin Gawade. Phone: +91 2138-223405.

facilities.name: Veterinary Dispensary (Category 1)
facilities.details: Cattle vaccination, artificial insemination, and fodder development advising. Livestock Officer: Dr. Sandip Nighot.

facilities.name: Anganwadi Center (Gothan Area)
facilities.details: Supplementary nutrition and pre-school education activities. Worker: Smt. Mangal Solankar.

facilities.name: Anganwadi Center (Wablewadi Road Block)
facilities.details: Preschool lessons and child weight monitoring. Worker: Smt. Savita Khese.

facilities.name: Bhima River Jackwell & Water Filtration Scheme
facilities.details: Integrated water intake from Bhima river with chlorination tanks. Supplying clean drinking water to all village wards.

facilities.name: Overhead Storage Tank (Rasai Mandir Hill)
facilities.details: Capacity: 1,20,000 Liters. Services the higher-elevation neighborhoods and pilgrim rest house zones.

facilities.name: Gram Panchayat Karyalaya, Vadgaon Rasai
facilities.details: Administrative office for Shirur block. Sarpanch: Smt. Rohini Kadam. Gram Sevak: Mr. D. S. Bhosale. Phone: +91 99220 88771. Hours: 10:00 AM - 5:00 PM.

facilities.name: Shirur-Vadgaon Rasai State Highway Link
facilities.details: MSRDC double-lane road connecting the village directly to Shirur taluka headquarter markets.

facilities.name: Mandavgan Pharata Link Road
facilities.details: District road link facilitating connection to adjacent agricultural belts and sugarcane factories.

facilities.name: Rasai Devi Devasthan Trust Pilgrim Rest House
facilities.details: Dharamshala rooms and community kitchen facility for visiting devotees during the annual village fair.

facilities.name: Vadgaon Rasai Post Office (PIN 412211)
facilities.details: Sub-post office. Savings deposits, register post, Speed Post. Postmaster: Shri. Nitin Kalokhe.

facilities.name: Bank of Maharashtra (Vadgaon Rasai Branch)
facilities.details: Agricultural crop loans, gold loans, ATM services, and SHG credit linkages. Branch Manager: Shri. Saurabh Roy. Phone: +91 2138-223201.
